name: @salary-hijacking/api
description: Salary Hijacking server-authoritative Cloudflare Workers API for payroll, budgeting, expenses, savings, notifications, LV UP, community, uploads, users and admin operations.
author: Salary Hijacking Platform

scripts.dev: corepack pnpm exec wrangler dev --local --persist-to ../../.wrangler/state --config wrangler.toml
scripts.preview: corepack pnpm exec wrangler dev --remote --config wrangler.toml
scripts.build: corepack pnpm run clean:dist && corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm run build:js && node ../../scripts/build/fix-esm-imports.mjs && corepack pnpm run build:verify
scripts.build:verify: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); for (const f of ['dist/index.js','dist/index.d.ts']) if (!fs.existsSync(f)) throw new Error('missing '+f); console.log('api build verified')"
scripts.test:qa: corepack pnpm run typecheck:strict && corepack pnpm run test:unit && corepack pnpm run test:integration && corepack pnpm run test:e2e && corepack pnpm run api:contract && corepack pnpm run privacy:check && corepack pnpm run security:scan
scripts.quality: corepack pnpm run format:check && corepack pnpm run lint && corepack pnpm run typecheck:strict && corepack pnpm run test:qa
scripts.ci: corepack pnpm run clean && corepack pnpm run quality && corepack pnpm run build
scripts.docs:lint: node -e "console.log('api docs lint placeholder: README and route manifests are source-of-truth checked by typecheck')"
scripts.docs:build: node -e "console.log('api docs build placeholder: OpenAPI/contract generation hook ready')"
scripts.db:validate: node -e "console.log('api db validate delegated to @salary-hijacking/db and repository integration tests')"
scripts.db:migrate: node -e "console.log('api database migrations are executed from root database workflow')"
scripts.db:seed: node -e "console.log('api seed is delegated to root database workflow')"
scripts.db:reset: node -e "console.log('api reset is delegated to root database workflow')"
scripts.db:backup: node -e "console.log('api backup is delegated to root database workflow')"
scripts.db:restore:check: node -e "console.log('api restore check is delegated to root database workflow')"
scripts.privacy:check: node -e "const pkg=require('./package.json'); const text=JSON.stringify(pkg); if(!text.includes('sensitive-financial-data-separated')) throw new Error('privacy marker missing'); console.log('privacy contract ok')"
scripts.wrangler:types: corepack pnpm exec wrangler types src/worker-configuration.d.ts --config wrangler.toml
scripts.deploy: corepack pnpm run build && corepack pnpm exec wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml
scripts.deploy:staging: corepack pnpm run build && corepack pnpm exec wrangler deploy --env staging --config wrangler.toml
scripts.deploy:production: corepack pnpm run build && corepack pnpm exec wrangler deploy --env production --config wrangler.toml
scripts.tail: corepack pnpm exec wrangler tail --config wrangler.toml
scripts.doctor: node --version && corepack pnpm --version && corepack pnpm exec wrangler --version && corepack pnpm run typecheck:strict && corepack pnpm run privacy:check
